title: GEO Basics: What Is GEO?
description: Learn Generative Engine Optimization for AI citations.
content:
GEO = Generative Engine Optimization. Earn citations inside AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Grok, Meta AI.

Key GEO tactics?

Statistics addition (+41% AI citation lift), cite sources (+28%), quotation addition (+28%).

Why GEO matters?

AI search synthesizes single answers, names 2-5 brands. The mention is the conversion event.

title: Princeton GEO Study Results
description: Peer-reviewed GEO study from Princeton University (ACM KDD 2024).
content:
Princeton + Georgia Tech + IIT Delhi + Allen Institute tested 9 strategies across 10,000 queries.

Top findings?

Statistics Addition: +41% AI citation lift. Cite Sources: +28%. Keyword stuffing: -9% (hurts AI visibility).
